name: Fighting the second God
description:
Oh geez your fighting an old man. I hope he doesn't hold any divine powers or a scary form that can kill you right. Right?

So I watched Record of Ragnarok and I gotta say while it may not always surpass every peak anime there is. It's still the best anime I suggest you watch the series on Netflix. But I can't wait for season 3 for my G.O.A.T Qin Shi Huang!!!
creator: The5stargang
